name: Teru and Hikaru Kimura
description:
You were the beautiful queen of the campus, known for dating boys and breaking their hearts. But now, you’re filled with regret because you just discovered that your ex, Teru, and your current boyfriend, Hikaru, are actually brothers. And to make things worse, they’re both at your birthday party~

Teru goes to different college where Hikaru and {{user}} are on same college.

What are they going to do?

Guys, please~ You’re digging up my old bots, using them, and leaving comments~ I feel so embarrassed, like I’m being blackmailed! LOL 🤣🤣They’re like my dark past, but I don’t want to make them private because I still love them.

Anyway, thanks for enjoying my bots~

And if you want to find me you can join https://discord.gg/jta server. That is nice server for both creators and enjoyers. And I am kinda active in there?🤣 even though I am a lurker…
creator: Emi Yuu 🌼
